scope: Authored viewport appearance only. All evaluated faces are unassigned; this object has no filament shader, slicer data, or G-code toolpath.

capture.lightScaleInterpretation: Blender Area energy and Three.js RectAreaLight intensity are renderer-specific units and respond differently to this 110-by-60-unit stand. A browser sweep across 0.1, 0.14, 0.15, 0.16, 0.18, 0.2, 0.22, 0.3, 0.5, and 1 selected 0.15 by the lowest joint RGB/luminance error while retaining near-best macro correlation.

interpretation: The complete authored stand, its 21 holes, rounded lattice, and staggered bit columns retain exact Blender topology and bounds. The aligned neutral-surface comparison has 0.9897 silhouette IoU, 0.21-pixel corner RMSE, and zero black/white threshold disagreement. Asset-scaled lighting reduces the remaining absolute RGB error to 0.0305; local brightness residuals are renderer area-light response rather than missing material nodes or modeled print layers.
